query:
SELECT c.name as categoria, COUNT(e.id) as completos
FROM establishments e
JOIN categories c ON e.categoryId = c.id
WHERE e.name IS NOT NULL AND e.name != '' 
  AND e.address IS NOT NULL AND e.address != '' 
  AND e.neighborhood IS NOT NULL AND e.neighborhood != '' 
  AND e.phone IS NOT NULL AND e.phone != '' 
  AND e.instagram IS NOT NULL AND e.instagram != '' 
  AND e.hours IS NOT NULL AND e.hours != '' 
  AND e.hasMenu = 1
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY completos DESC

WHERE e.name IS NOT NULL AND e.name != '' 
  AND e.address IS NOT NULL AND e.address != '' 
  AND e.neighborhood IS NOT NULL AND e.neighborhood != '' 
  AND e.phone IS NOT NULL AND e.phone != '' 
  AND e.instagram IS NOT NULL AND e.instagram != '' 
  AND e.hours IS NOT NULL AND e.hours != ''

ORDER BY completos DESC
